_meta.name: Pocket Tracker Vintage Polly Pocket Knowledge Base
_meta.description: Open community database of vintage Bluebird Polly Pocket sets (1989-1998). Used by the Pocket Tracker app for offline lookups. Prices are estimated resale ranges based on eBay sold listings — always verify current market.
_meta.priceNote: All prices are USD estimates based on recent eBay sold listings. Play = heavy wear or incomplete. Good = used, mostly complete. Mint = complete, excellent or MIB. Prices fluctuate.
_meta.contributing: ADD NEW SETS in the correct year section below. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full guide.

sets.name: Polly's Beach House
sets.notes: One of the original 1989 sets. Light-green clamshell. Upper: bedrooms, bathroom, eating area. Lower: shore with dock.

sets.name: Polly's Funfair
sets.notes: Dark pink square compact. Upper: rocket ride. Lower: park grounds and concession stand.

sets.name: Polly's Cafe
sets.notes: Pink shell compact. Upper: cafe sitting area and sleeping area with locker. Lower: food prep area and counter.

sets.name: Country Cottage
sets.notes: Classic pink heart compact. Upper: bedroom, bathroom, living room, kitchen. Lower: garden with pond, bridge, two trees. One of the most iconic originals.

sets.name: Midge's Play School
sets.notes: Yellow square compact. Features Midge character rather than Polly. Upper: bedroom, bathroom, nursery, classroom. Lower: playground.

sets.name: Polly's Skating Party
sets.notes: Slate blue round compact. Upper: mall with jewellery, clothing, hair salon. Lower: skating rink, eating area, snack bars.

sets.name: Polly's Pony Club
sets.notes: Lime green compact. Complete means both dolls AND the horse.

sets.name: Wild Zoo World
sets.notes: Zoo-themed compact. Animal figures are commonly separated and lost. Variations exist between UK and US releases.

sets.name: Polly's Town House
sets.notes: Orange townhouse compact. Multi-level with multiple rooms.

sets.name: Polly's Flat
sets.notes: Purple compact apartment. Also known as Polly's Studio Flat.

sets.name: High Street Moneybox
sets.notes: Coin/money box format rather than clamshell compact. Features Polly and Tiny Tina.

sets.name: Buttons' Animal Hospital
sets.notes: Features the Buttons character. Animal hospital theme. Small animals are frequently missing.

sets.name: Heidi's Alpine Chalet
sets.notes: International-themed set. Features Heidi character. Not widely distributed outside Europe.

sets.name: Tammy's Palm Tree Island
sets.notes: Tropical island theme. Features Tammy character.

sets.name: Polly Pool Party
sets.notes: Original 1989 pool set. Pink rectangle compact.

sets.name: Pretty Nails Playset
sets.notes: Beauty accessory set from the original 1989 line.

sets.name: Suki's Japanese Tea House
sets.notes: Pink octagon compact. Features Atsuko and Suki — not Polly. Upper: restaurant with low table and cushions. Lower: garden. International-themed.

sets.name: Water Fun Park
sets.notes: Bright green flower-shaped compact. Dark green variant also exists. Upper: eating area, clown ride, water slide, bathroom. Lower: pool and spa.

sets.name: Polly's Hair Salon
sets.notes: Yellow octagon compact. Upper: tanning table, supply room, hair salon. Lower: work stations and reception.

sets.name: Garden Surprise
sets.notes: Garden-themed 1990 compact.

sets.name: Midge's Flower Shop
sets.notes: Midge-character set. Flower shop theme.

sets.name: Fifi's Parisian Apartment
sets.notes: Shell-only sells around $60. International-themed. Features Fifi with Paris setting. One of the harder 1990 sets to find complete.

sets.name: Polly's School
sets.notes: Green compact. Different from the 1993 light-up Schoolhouse.

sets.name: Mr. Fry's Restaurant
sets.notes: One of the few male-named sets in the line.

sets.name: Polly in Her Necklace
sets.notes: Wearable necklace. Polly doll is the pendant itself. Chain frequently separated.

sets.name: Polly in her Bedroom Locket
sets.notes: Tiny yellow heart locket — wearable as a necklace. Upper: chair and photo frame. Lower: bedroom with bed and dresser. One of the smallest PP sets ever made.

sets.name: Pullout Playhouse
sets.notes: Unique format — unfolds like a book rather than clamshell. Very distinctive piece.

sets.name: Polly's Dream World
sets.notes: Comes with Polly, a canoe, a cow, and a dog — small accessories often lost.

sets.name: Bathtime Fun
sets.notes: Bathroom-themed compact from 1991.

sets.name: '50s Diner
sets.shape: Round compact (yellow) with wearable ring base
sets.notes: Unique ring-compact hybrid. Yellow round case sits on a wearable ring base. Ring base and car are frequently separated and lost.

sets.name: Rosie Learns Ballet
sets.notes: Ballet studio theme. Features Rosie character rather than Polly.

sets.name: Camp Days Locket
sets.notes: Part of the 1991 locket series. Wearable as a necklace pendant.

sets.name: Dinkie and her Dolphin
sets.notes: Ocean-themed. Features Dinkie character. Dolphin figure is small and commonly missing.

sets.name: Tiny Tina's Dressmaking Ring
sets.notes: Complete means: Tiny Tina, dog, chair, AND yellow ring base.

sets.name: Fairy Fantasy
sets.notes: Purple star-shaped compact. Upper: tree house, mushrooms, swing. Lower: bridge, river, teeter-totter. Small accessories frequently lost.

sets.name: Jewelled Sea
sets.notes: Blue round compact with blue jewel on cover. Part of the jewelled series. Upper: ship interior. Lower: underwater scene.

sets.name: Fast Food Restaurant
sets.notes: Light purple pentagon compact. Complete includes 2 dolls and food tray.

sets.name: Jewelled Palace
sets.notes: Part of the 1992 jewelled series.

sets.name: Starlight Castle
sets.notes: Highly collectible. Lights up. Unopened near $300. Horse and carriage commonly missing — their absence significantly affects value.

sets.name: Fairy Wishing World
sets.notes: Fairy-themed 1992 compact.

sets.name: Princess Polly's Ice Kingdom
sets.notes: Winter/ice kingdom theme. Polar bear figure is small and often missing.

sets.name: Polly in the Nursery
sets.notes: Nursery-themed 1992 compact.

sets.name: Babysitting Stamper
sets.notes: Part of the 1992 stamper sub-line. Many small pieces commonly lost.

sets.name: Jewelled Forest
sets.notes: Part of the 1992 jewelled series. Forest theme.

sets.name: Light-Up Schoolhouse
dolls: Mitzi aka Kim (brown bun, pink top, backpack)
Ms. Lila aka Penny (red ponytail, dark blue dress, chalkboard eraser)
Dixie aka Marie (brown pigtails, aqua dress, basketball hoop)
sets.notes: One of the most detailed 1993 sets. Press chimney button to light up. Purple roof, yellow walls, slide in yard, white fence. All 4 doll names vary between US and UK releases.

sets.name: Bay Window House
sets.shape: House with bay window and lights
sets.notes: 1993 light-up house. 4 dolls included. Distinctive bay window design.

sets.name: Polly's Cozy Cottage
sets.notes: Sleepover/slumber party theme. Both dolls in pyjamas. Upper: two beds. Lower: living room. Yellow mailbox exterior.

sets.name: Wedding Chapel
sets.notes: Lights work. Complete means all 3 wedding party figures. Groom is most frequently missing.

sets.name: Winter Ski Lodge
sets.notes: Winter sports theme. Popular seasonal set.

sets.name: Holiday Toy Shop
sets.notes: Christmas/holiday themed. Reindeer and sleigh are key completeness markers. Wings frequently broken.

sets.name: Pretty Pandas Playset
sets.notes: Blue heart-shaped compact. Complete includes 1 doll and 2 pandas. Panda figures small and frequently separated.

sets.name: Merry-Go-Round Pals
sets.notes: Carousel/merry-go-round fairground theme.

sets.name: Pet Shop
sets.notes: 1993 pet shop. Small animal figures prone to being lost.

sets.name: Fairylight Wonderland
commonlyMissing: Working lights — many examples no longer function
sets.notes: Highly collectible light-up fairy set. Complete means 3 dolls AND working lights. Left staircase railing commonly missing. Confirmed working lights command a premium.

sets.name: Seashine Mermaid Locket
sets.notes: Wearable mermaid locket. Unique mermaid doll. Popular among collectors.

sets.name: Ballerina Playset
sets.notes: Purple compact. Ballet theme. Different from the 1991 Rosie Learns Ballet.

sets.name: Dazzling Dog Show
sets.notes: Dog show theme. Small dog figures often separated from set.

sets.name: Pretty Bunnies
sets.notes: Bunny/rabbit themed 1993 compact.

sets.name: Bedtime Fun
sets.notes: Bedtime-themed 1993 compact.

sets.name: McDonald's Christmas Compact
sets.notes: Manufactured for McDonald's. Red and green holiday compact. McDonald's PP collaboration ran through the 90s.

sets.name: Light-Up Magical Mansion
sets.batteryType: Press yellow patio table on left side to activate
sets.notes: THE flagship 1994 set. Ballroom and tanning bed light up via yellow patio table. 5 flags keep floors level when open — missing flags are the #1 completeness issue. Horse and carriage are premium accessories.

sets.name: Pollyville Treehouse
sets.notes: Pollyville series. Green tree house. Rope ladder often missing.

sets.name: Light-Up Wedding Chapel
sets.notes: Working light-up chapel. Different from the 1993 Wedding Chapel.

sets.name: Grandma's Cottage
sets.notes: Charming domestic theme. Tart tray often missing.

sets.name: Drive-Thru Burger Stand
sets.notes: Drive-thru restaurant theme. Balloons are commonly missing.

sets.name: Star Bright Dinner Party
sets.notes: Dinner party theme. Complete set has 3 dolls.

sets.name: Baby Time Fun Nursery
sets.notes: Blue quilted heart compact. Babysitting/nursery theme. Includes adult doll and 2 babies.

sets.name: Barclay's Cottage
sets.notes: Features Barclay the dog as a main character.

sets.name: Stable on the Go
sets.notes: Bluebird Toys camper van with horse. Horse figure is the key completeness marker.

sets.name: Happy Birthday Cake
sets.notes: Described as 'Very Rare' by collectors. Birthday cake compact format.

sets.name: Perfect Playroom
commonlyMissing: Polly — not included in this set
sets.notes: Quilted pink compact. Note: does NOT include Polly — comes with 2 children figures.

sets.name: Splash N Slide Water Park
sets.notes: Large-format water park playset.

sets.name: Polly's Dream Pool
sets.notes: Pool-themed compact from 1995.

sets.name: Pollyville Pet Shop
sets.notes: Pet shop from the Pollyville series. Different from 1993 Pet Shop.

sets.name: Pop-Up Clubhouse
sets.notes: Pop-up expanding format. Comes with 5 figures. Multiple figures means many commonly missing.

sets.name: Dress Shop
sets.notes: Fashion/clothing shop theme from 1995.

sets.name: Forever Friends Picnic Hamper
sets.notes: Part of the Forever Friends sub-line. Picnic hamper format.

sets.name: Garden Sparkle Locket
sets.notes: Described as 'ultra rare' by collectors. Locket format with garden theme and sparkle detailing.

sets.name: Horse Carriage Circus Gypsy Wagon
sets.notes: Circus/gypsy caravan theme. Comes with horse and gypsy figure. Horse commonly missing.

sets.name: Pool Party on the Go
sets.notes: Portable pool party set.

sets.name: Vintage Polly Pocket Hand Mirror
sets.notes: Described as 'Very Rare & Hard To Find'. Child-size hand mirror — a functional accessory, not a compact. Paint wear on surface is common.

sets.name: Polly's Starshine Palace
sets.notes: Highly collectible late Bluebird palace set.

sets.name: Polly's Toy Land Storybook
commonlyMissing: Key — finding one with the key is premium
sets.notes: Book-format compact with key lock. Key is almost always missing — complete with key commands significant premium.

sets.name: Fountain Fantasy
sets.shape: Pink water lily / lotus flower compact
sets.notes: Pink water lily lotus flower format. Beautiful late-era compact design.

sets.name: Magical Movin Pollyville
sets.notes: Features moving/motorized mechanical elements.

sets.name: Jewel Magic Ball Sparkle Surprise
sets.notes: Complete examples sell $200-$325. One of the highest-value sets in the entire Bluebird line. Sphere/ball format is unique.

sets.name: Story Book Compact
sets.notes: White variant sells $300+. Highly sought after. Rarer than the standard colourway.

sets.name: Sparkle Surprise Bubbly Bath
sets.notes: Sparkle series bubbly bath theme.

sets.name: Cinderella Enchanted Castle
sets.notes: Disney collaboration. Working lights on many examples. Complete Disney compacts in excellent condition reach $600-$700 at auction.

sets.name: Beauty and the Beast Castle
sets.notes: Disney collaboration. Unopened around $300. Disney compacts in excellent complete condition often reach $600-$700.

sets.name: Little Mermaid Compact
sets.notes: Disney collaboration. Part of the Disney Tiny Collection series.

sets.name: Mickey's Magic Kingdom Theme Park
sets.notes: One of the largest and most complex Bluebird sets. Train wheels spin. Sounds often don't work. Carousel stores in hidden drawer in front. Sun discolouration on tops is common. Tower tips frequently missing or bent.

sets.name: Pretty Me Make-Up Compact
sets.notes: Beauty/make-up themed compact from the original 1989 line. Designed to look like a real make-up compact.

sets.name: Beach Party
sets.notes: Beach-themed 1989 compact. Different from Polly's Beach House (shell compact).

sets.name: Bridesmaid Polly
sets.notes: Also known as Nancy's Wedding Day in some markets. Features Polly as a bridesmaid. Nancy is frequently the missing doll.

sets.name: Christmas
sets.notes: Original 1989 Christmas-themed compact. Seasonal sets command a small collector premium.

sets.name: Polly Pocket Jewellery Box
sets.notes: Jewellery box format rather than a clamshell compact. Novelty storage/play hybrid.

sets.name: Jewel Case Play-Set
sets.notes: Large jewel case format. Collector note: often found with original outer box still intact.

sets.name: Disco Cassette Play Set
sets.notes: Also known as Bowling Alley Cassette Player. Shaped like a cassette tape — very distinctive novelty form factor. Dual theme: bowling alley and disco.

sets.name: Ring Collecting Case
sets.notes: A case designed to store and display the various 1989 ring sets. Rings are nearly always incomplete as they get separated over time.

sets.name: Pretty Me
sets.notes: Beauty-themed compact. Similar to Pretty Me Make-Up Compact but a distinct set.

sets.name: Polly World
sets.notes: Polly with green shoes and pink dress carrying 3 balloons. Includes ride car with purple and silver color. Often confused with Polly's Funfair.

sets.name: Polly's Speedboat Ring
sets.notes: Wearable ring with speedboat-themed compact. Ring base is almost always missing.

sets.name: Polly's Bedtime Ring
sets.notes: Wearable ring with bedtime/bedroom-themed compact. Also known as Polly's Bed Time.

sets.name: Dressing Up Time with Polly
sets.notes: Also known as Dressing Table in Mattel packaging. Fashion/wardrobe theme.

sets.name: Pixie's Homework Ring
sets.notes: Features Pixie character doing homework. Wearable ring base almost always missing.

sets.name: Midge's Schooltime Ring
sets.notes: Midge character at school. Wearable ring format. Ring base frequently missing.

sets.name: Tiny Tina's Dinner Time Ring
sets.notes: Tiny Tina at dinner. Wearable ring format. Ring base frequently missing.

sets.name: Little Lulu's Bath Time
sets.notes: Little Lulu character in the bath. Wearable ring format.

sets.name: Polly's Sports Car Ring
sets.notes: Polly in a sports car. Also simply called Sports Car in some markets. Ring base and car frequently missing.

sets.name: Wee Willie's Sports Car Ring
sets.notes: Features Wee Willie character rather than Polly. Male character ring set. Ring base almost always missing.

sets.name: Party Purse
sets.notes: Shaped like a small handbag/purse rather than a compact. Novelty form factor. Party theme inside.

sets.name: Midge's Bumper Car
sets.notes: Features Midge character at a fairground bumper car ride. Bumper car accessory is frequently missing.

sets.name: Pretty Hair Playset
sets.notes: Hair/beauty themed accessory set from 1990.

sets.name: Writing Case Playset
sets.notes: Stationery/writing case format. School/study theme.

sets.name: Pencil Case
sets.notes: Shaped like a pencil case rather than a compact. Novelty school-themed form factor.

sets.name: Little Lulu's Hair Slides
sets.notes: Wearable hair slide/barrette set featuring Little Lulu. Individual slides are easily lost.

sets.name: Pixie's Hairslides
sets.notes: Wearable hair slide/barrette set featuring Pixie. Part of the 1990 accessories sub-line.

sets.name: Shooting Star Barrettes
sets.notes: Wearable star-shaped barrettes. Part of the 1990 accessories sub-line. No doll included — purely wearable accessories.

sets.name: Tiny Trinkets Dressing Table Playset
sets.notes: Also known as Pyjama Party Dressing Table. Dressing table format with tiny trinket accessories. Variation exists between names.

sets.name: Polly Plays Bride
sets.notes: Wearable ring with wedding/bride theme. Also known as Polly Plays a Bride. Ring base almost always missing.

sets.name: Polly Pushes a Stroller
sets.notes: Also known as Polly Pushes the Pram (UK). Wearable ring format. Baby figure and ring base are frequently missing.

sets.name: Polly on Her Pony Ring
sets.notes: Wearable ring with pony-riding theme. Ring base and pony figure frequently missing.

sets.name: Polly Plays Princess Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Polly on a Throne. Wearable ring format. Complete means doll, chair, AND blue ring base.

sets.name: Bathtime Soap Dish
sets.notes: Shaped like a soap dish rather than a compact. Very distinctive novelty form factor. One of the more unusual 1990 sets.

sets.name: Drawing Set
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Drawing Set. Art/creativity themed compact.

sets.name: Pencil Tops
sets.notes: Tiny Polly character figures designed to sit on top of pencils. Not a compact — purely accessory items. Individual toppers nearly always separated.

sets.name: Pixie in her Necklace
sets.notes: Also known as Pixie in her Pendant. Wearable necklace — Pixie doll IS the pendant. Chain frequently separated.

sets.name: Little Lulu in her Necklace
sets.notes: Also known as Little Lulu in her Pendant. Little Lulu doll IS the wearable pendant. Chain frequently separated.

sets.name: Midge in her Necklace
sets.notes: Also known as Midge in her Pendant. Midge doll IS the wearable pendant. Chain frequently separated.

sets.name: Pretty Picture Locket
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Art Studio Locket. Art/painting theme. Wearable locket format.

sets.name: Polly in her Keep-Fit Locket
aliases: polly in her health club locket
sets.notes: Also known as Polly in her Health Club Locket. Exercise/gym theme. Wearable locket format.

sets.name: Polly in her Music Room Locket
sets.notes: Also known as Polly in her Music Locket. Music/piano theme. Wearable locket format.

sets.name: Little Lulu Seaside Locket
sets.notes: Features Little Lulu rather than Polly. Seaside/beach theme. Wearable locket format.

sets.name: Funtime Clock
sets.notes: Functional clock with a tiny Polly Pocket scene. Battery-powered clock mechanism. Many examples no longer keep time — working examples command a premium.

sets.name: Seashell Dangly Earrings
sets.notes: Also known as Tiny Tina's Seashell Earrings. Wearable child-size dangly earrings. No doll — purely wearable accessory. Individual earring backs frequently lost.

sets.name: Stardream Dangly Earrings
sets.notes: Also known as Little Lulu's Moonshine Earrings. Star/moon-shaped wearable earrings. Purely accessory — no doll included.

sets.name: Sammie on a Skateboard
sets.notes: Features Sammie character on a skateboard. Skateboard is a separate small accessory, frequently missing.

sets.name: Suzy on Safari
sets.notes: Features Suzy character on an African safari. Small animal figures and jeep are frequently missing.

sets.name: Lulu and her Speedboat
sets.notes: Features Lulu character. Speedboat is a separate accessory — frequently missing.

sets.name: Midge's Bedtime Ring and Ring Case
sets.notes: Ring case format — comes with both the compact scene AND a ring case to store it. Both the ring base and the case are frequently separated.

sets.name: Polly's Dressing Room Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Big Night Out Ring and Ring Case. Glamorous dressing room scene. Ring base and case frequently missing.

sets.name: Perfect Piano Recital Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Grand Piano Ring and Ring Case. Concert/recital theme. Ring base and case frequently missing.

sets.name: Dazzling Dressmaker Ring
aliases: tiny tinas dressmaking ring and ring case
sets.notes: Also known as Tiny Tina's Dressmaking Ring and Ring Case. NOTE: this is distinct from the 1991 standalone Tiny Tina's Dressmaking Ring (no case). Sewing machine is a tiny separate piece — frequently missing.

sets.name: Polly's Dinner Time Ring
sets.notes: Ring and ring case format. Dinner/dining theme. All three components — compact, ring, ring case — are rarely found together.

sets.name: Crystal Polly Necklace
sets.notes: Polly figure is made in clear/crystal plastic — unique to this set. Wearable necklace format. Chain frequently separated.

sets.name: Polly's Lip Gloss Case
sets.notes: Lip gloss case format — beauty/vanity theme.

sets.name: Earring Case
sets.notes: Light green or lavender leaf-shaped compact with grooves to hold a pair of earrings. Earrings included but almost always missing. No doll in this set.

sets.name: Let's Party!
sets.notes: Party game/board game compact. Game pieces and spinner are tiny and almost always missing. Rare to find complete.

sets.name: Pop-Ups Flower
commonlyMissing: Pop-up mechanism damaged in many examples
sets.notes: Pop-up expanding flower format. Mechanism frequently damaged or stuck in older examples.

sets.name: Pop-Ups Bow
sets.notes: Bow/ribbon shaped pop-up compact. One of four Pop-Ups sets in 1992.

sets.name: Pop-Ups Butterfly
sets.notes: Butterfly-shaped pop-up compact. Wings of the butterfly mechanism are frequently damaged.

sets.name: Pop-Ups Seashell
sets.notes: Seashell-shaped pop-up compact. Fourth and final of the 1992 Pop-Ups series.

sets.name: Fairy Spells Locket
sets.notes: Also known as Little Lulu's Fairy Spells Locket. Features Little Lulu as a fairy. Wand is a tiny separate accessory — frequently missing.

sets.name: Skating Star Locket
sets.notes: Ice skating themed wearable locket.

sets.name: Film Star Locket
sets.notes: Hollywood/film studio themed locket. Camera is a tiny separate piece, frequently missing.

sets.name: Fairy Garden Locket
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Fairyland Locket. Fairy garden theme. Wearable locket format.

sets.name: Fashion Fun
sets.notes: Fashion show theme compact from 1992.

sets.name: Polly's Fairy Fashion Show
sets.notes: Fairy-themed fashion show. Distinct from the standard Fashion Fun compact.

sets.name: Hollywood Star
sets.notes: Star-shaped Hollywood film set compact. Small accessories (camera, chair) are frequently missing.

sets.name: Bathing Beauty Pageant
sets.notes: Beauty pageant theme. Comes with multiple figures.

sets.name: Tiny Ballerina Ring
aliases: tiny ballerina ring and ring case
sets.notes: Ballet theme ring and ring case set. All three components (compact, ring, case) are rarely found together.

sets.name: Pretty Present Locket
sets.notes: Also known as Polly in her Birthday Party Locket and Princess Polly's Birthday Locket. Birthday/party theme. Wearable locket.

sets.name: Dress-Up Jewel Locket
sets.notes: Also known as Princess Polly in her Dressing Up Locket. Features a jewel on the cover — part of the jewelled series. Wearable locket.

sets.name: Sky Princess Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Princess Mia's Sapphire Ring. One of four 1992 Princess Rings. Wearable as actual finger ring.

sets.name: Springtime Princess Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Princess Gemma's Emerald Ring. Spring garden theme. Wearable as actual finger ring.

sets.name: Rose Princess Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Princess Yasmin's Ruby Ring. Rose/garden theme. Wearable as actual finger ring.

sets.name: Snow Princess Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Princess Anna's Diamond Ring. Winter/snow theme. Fourth of the four 1992 Princess Rings.

sets.name: Princess Yasmin's Dangly Earrings
sets.notes: Wearable child-size earrings in Princess Yasmin style. No doll — purely wearable. Earring backs frequently lost.

sets.name: Shooting Star Necklace
sets.notes: Also known as Princess Polly's Necklace. Wearable star-shaped pendant. Chain frequently separated from pendant.

sets.name: Polly's Magic Wishing Bell
sets.notes: Also known as Princess Polly's Magic Wishing Bell and Earrings. Bell and earring set — no doll included. Earrings are tiny and frequently missing.

sets.name: Polly's Perfume Wrist Band
sets.notes: Also known as Pretty Perfume Wrist Band. Wearable bracelet containing a tiny perfume bottle — no doll. Tiny bottle frequently missing.

sets.name: The Jewel Collection
sets.notes: Collection set featuring multiple jewel-themed accessories. Individual pieces are frequently separated.

sets.name: Princess Polly's Sparkling Headband
sets.notes: Also known as Princess Polly's Headband. Wearable child-size headband — no doll included. Purely accessory item.

sets.name: Polly's Golden Dream
sets.notes: Gold-themed dream compact from 1992.

sets.name: Polly's Charm Bracelet
sets.notes: Wearable charm bracelet with multiple tiny Polly-themed charms. No doll — purely wearable. Individual charms almost always missing.

sets.name: Princess Anna's Hair Slide
sets.notes: Wearable hair slide/barrette with Princess Anna design. Purely accessory — no doll.

sets.name: Lady Bird Pen Pal
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Ladybird Pen Pal. Functional pen shaped like a ladybug/ladybird with tiny Polly scene inside. Pen ink dried in most examples. One of four 1992 Pen Pals.

sets.name: Dolphin Pen Pal
sets.notes: Also known as Tiny Tina's Dolphin Pen Pal. Functional dolphin-shaped pen. Ink dried in most examples.

sets.name: Snail Pen Pal
sets.notes: Also known as Suzy's Snail Pen Pal. Functional snail-shaped pen. Ink dried in most examples.

sets.name: Elephant Pen Pal
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Elephant Pen Pal. Functional elephant-shaped pen. Fourth of the 1992 Pen Pal series.

sets.name: Partytime Stamper Playset
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Party Stamper Set. Ultra rare complete. Complete includes: 3 dolls, 3 stamps (unused), pink cake, stamp cover, sealed ink. Sealed ink with gold logo in excellent condition is extremely collectible. Pink heart compact.

sets.name: Stampin' School Playset
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Stamper Play-Set. Comes with 5 dolls — more than almost any other set. Ink dried in nearly all examples. Individual stamps frequently missing.

sets.name: Beach Cafe
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Beach Cafe. 1993 version — distinct from the 1989 Polly's Cafe shell compact. Variations exist.

sets.name: Toy Shop
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Toy Shop. The basic toy shop — distinct from the Holiday Toy Shop (which has reindeer/sleigh). Variations exist.

sets.name: Pizzeria
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Pizza Place. One of the most iconic 1993 sets — frequently cited alongside the Beach Cafe and Bridal Salon as a 'classic' of the era.

sets.name: Ski Lodge
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Ski Chalet. Winter sports chalet theme. Distinct from Holiday Chalet.

sets.name: Holiday Chalet
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Musical Cottage. Features a musical mechanism — many examples no longer play. Working music is a premium.

sets.name: Summer House
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Holiday Cottage. Summer/garden cottage theme.

sets.name: Polly Pocket Clock
sets.notes: Functional clock with Polly Pocket scene. Similar concept to the 1991 Funtime Clock. Clock mechanism frequently non-working in older examples.

sets.name: Princess Palace
sets.notes: Wearable locket in palace format. One of the more elaborate locket sets of 1993.

sets.name: Cuddly Kitty
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Cuddly Kitten. Cat/kitten themed compact. Kitten figures are small and frequently missing. Variation exists.

sets.name: Precious Puppies
sets.notes: Also known as Polly and her Puppies. Puppy/dog themed companion to Kozy Kitties. Small puppy figures frequently missing.

sets.name: Kozy Kitties
sets.notes: Also known as Polly and her Kittens. Companion to Precious Puppies. Kitten figures are tiny and frequently missing.

sets.name: Baby and Ducky
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Bathtime Locket. Features baby and duck figures rather than Polly. Duck figure is frequently missing.

sets.name: Baby and Blanket
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Bedtime Locket. Baby with blanket — bedtime theme. Blanket is a soft accessory, frequently missing.

sets.name: Fuzzy Kitten Locket
sets.shape: Locket (wearable) with fuzzy kitten on cover
commonlyMissing: Fuzzy texture worn off on many examples
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Kitten Locket. Has fuzzy/flocked texture on the cover — a hallmark feature. Texture wears off over time; pristine fuzz is a sign of good condition.

sets.name: Fuzzy Bunny Locket
sets.shape: Locket (wearable) with fuzzy bunny on cover
commonlyMissing: Fuzzy texture worn off on many examples
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Bunny Locket. Companion to Fuzzy Kitten Locket. Fuzzy/flocked cover texture — condition of fuzz is a key grading factor.

sets.name: Easter Fun Locket
sets.notes: Seasonal Easter locket. Small accessories (chicks, eggs) frequently missing. Seasonal sets command a small collector premium.

sets.name: Butterfly Fairy
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Butterfly Necklace. Fairy with butterfly wings. Wearable necklace format.

sets.name: Flutter Fairy Locket
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Flower Necklace. Flower fairy theme. Wearable necklace format. Companion to Butterfly Fairy.

sets.name: Rose Dream Necklace
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Heart Crystal Pendant. Heart-shaped crystal pendant with rose scene inside. Chain frequently separated.

sets.name: Jewel Surprise Necklace
commonlyMissing: Missing purple ring in many examples
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Oval Crystal Pendant. Oval crystal with surprise interior. Chain frequently separated. Some examples missing the purple ring element.

sets.name: Teeter-Totter Pals
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's See-saw. Playground theme. Companion piece to Merry Go Round Pals.

sets.name: Li'l Pet Carts
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Pets' Day Out. Pet carts with animals. Wheel pieces and small animal figures are frequently missing.

sets.name: Totally Toy Holiday
sets.notes: McDonald's Happy Meal toy. Part of the Totally Toy Holiday promotion. Distinct from the basic McDonald's Christmas compact.

sets.name: Pretty Present Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Birthday Surprise. Birthday gift theme. Wearable finger ring. Ring base frequently missing.

sets.name: Tannin' Time Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Sunbathing Ring. Beach/tanning theme. One of the more playful ring sets.

sets.name: Secret Rose Fairy Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Secret Rose Ring. Rose fairy theme. Wearable ring.

sets.name: Pony Parade Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Circus Pony. Circus/pony show theme. Pony figure and ring base are frequently missing.

sets.name: Cake Surprise Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Surprise Cake Ring. Birthday cake theme. Small candle accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Tulip Petal Fairy Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Little Lulu's Secret Tulip Ring. Features Little Lulu as a fairy. Tulip flower shaped ring.

sets.name: Jewel Surprise Ring
commonlyMissing: Purple ring base — most commonly missing piece
sets.notes: Also known as Princess Polly's Secret Ring. Sparkly globe sits atop a purple ring. The purple ring base is almost always missing — finding this complete is notable.

sets.name: Royal Throne Ring
sets.notes: Royal/princess throne theme. Wearable ring format.

sets.name: Rose Dream Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Princess Pixie's Secret Ring / Pixie's Rose Dream. Features Pixie character. Rose-shaped wearable ring.

sets.name: Let's Party Game
sets.notes: Party board game compact. Almost always incomplete — game cards and spinner are tiny and nearly always missing. Complete examples are rare.

sets.name: Stardust Fairy Earrings
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Dew Drop Earrings. Wearable dangly earrings — no doll. Star/dewdrop design.

sets.name: Beauty Pageant Earrings
sets.notes: Also known as Princess Pixie's Sparkly Earrings. Wearable sparkly earrings — no doll included.

sets.name: Swing Earrings
sets.notes: Swing/playground shaped wearable earrings. No doll included. One of three earring sets in 1993.

sets.name: Elephant House
sets.notes: Also known as Jumbo's Lodge. Compact shaped like an elephant. One of the animal house sub-series. Jumbo figure frequently missing.

sets.name: Giraffe House
sets.notes: Also known as Big G's Treetops. Compact shaped like a giraffe. Animal house sub-series. Giraffe figure frequently missing.

sets.name: Rabbit House
sets.notes: Also known as Bianca's Burrow. Compact shaped like a rabbit. Animal house sub-series. Rabbit figure and carrot accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Light-Up Horse House
sets.notes: Also known as Horseshoe Saloon. Horse-shaped compact with working lights. One of two light-up animal houses. Horse figure frequently missing.

sets.name: Light-Up Kitty House
sets.notes: Also known as Cat Mews House. Cat-shaped compact with working lights. Companion to Horse House. Mouse accessory is tiny and almost always missing.

sets.name: Light-Up Hotel
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Villa. Multi-story hotel with working lights. Multiple figures — some commonly missing.

sets.name: Light-Up Bridal Salon
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Bridal Store. Light-up bridal/wedding salon. Cited by collectors as one of the most iconic 1990s Polly sets. Groom figure is almost always missing.

sets.name: Nursery School
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Nursery and Polly's Lullaby Nursery. Nursery school theme. Variation with musical mechanism exists.

sets.name: Slumber Party Fun
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Video Party. Sleepover/slumber party theme. Companion to Star Bright Dinner Party.

sets.name: Palm Tree Play Set
sets.notes: Also known as Palm Tree Pool and Palm Tree Beach. Tropical/pool theme built around a palm tree shape.

sets.name: Climbing Tree Play Set
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Oak Tree Garden and Shady Tree. Garden/climbing tree theme. Rope ladder and swing frequently missing.

sets.name: Musical Dream Wedding
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Wonderful Wedding Party. Large musical wedding set. Music mechanism frequently non-working. One of the most elaborate wedding sets in the line.

sets.name: Fairytale Castle
sets.notes: Large fairytale castle compact. Prince figure frequently missing.

sets.name: Koala Picnic
sets.notes: Australian-themed koala picnic compact. Koala figure and small food accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Polly on the Go
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Bicycle Friends. Cycling/active theme. Bicycle accessories are small and frequently missing.

sets.name: Scooter Fun
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Scooter Friends. Scooter/active theme. Companion to Polly on the Go.

sets.name: Happy Horses
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Pony Friends. Horse/riding theme. Horse figures frequently missing.

sets.name: Home on the Go
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Camper. RV/camper van format. Awning and small accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Pony Ridin' Show
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Pony Show (with show ring). Distinct from Pony Ridin' (the smaller version). Show accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Pony Ridin'
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Pony Show. The smaller/simpler pony set — distinct from Pony Ridin' Show (larger showground version).

sets.name: Strollin' Surprise
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Baby Buggy. Baby buggy with surprise reveal. Companion to Strollin' Baby.

sets.name: Pretty Egg Surprise
commonlyMissing: Egg hinge broken in many examples
sets.notes: Egg-shaped compact. Hinge connecting the two egg halves is fragile and frequently broken in older examples.

sets.name: Crown Surprise Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Surprise Crown Ring. Crown-shaped wearable ring with surprise element. Ring base frequently missing.

sets.name: Flower Surprise Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Surprise Flower Ring. Flower-shaped surprise ring. Ring base frequently missing.

sets.name: Pretty Pearl Surprise
sets.notes: Pearl/oyster themed surprise ring. Ring base frequently missing.

sets.name: Racy Roadster Ring
sets.notes: Sports car / roadster themed wearable ring. Ring base frequently missing.

sets.name: Charm Bracelets
sets.notes: Wearable charm bracelet set — no doll included. Companion to the 1992 Charm Bracelet. Individual charms almost always missing.

sets.name: Baby Bear Pendant
sets.notes: Also known as My Pet Bear and Polly's Baby Bear Pendant. Wearable necklace with tiny bear figure as pendant. Chain frequently separated.

sets.name: My Pet Puppy
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Puppy Pendant. Wearable necklace with tiny puppy figure as pendant. Chain frequently separated.

sets.name: Pretty Polly Locket
sets.notes: Wearable Polly locket for 1994. Chain frequently separated.

sets.name: Fairy Polly Star Watch
sets.notes: Wearable child's watch with Polly on the face. Watch mechanism usually non-functional in old examples. Strap frequently damaged or broken.

sets.name: Playset Watches
sets.notes: Wearable watch with Polly Pocket scene. Two known variants: salmon watch/salmon band, and pink watch/blue band. Mechanism usually non-functional.

sets.name: McDonald's Watch
sets.notes: McDonald's Happy Meal promotional watch. Part of the 1994 McDonald's PP collection. Mechanism rarely works.

sets.name: McDonald's Ring
sets.notes: McDonald's Happy Meal promotional wearable ring. Part of the 1994 McDonald's PP collection.

sets.name: McDonald's Bracelet
sets.notes: McDonald's Happy Meal promotional bracelet. Part of the 1994 McDonald's PP collection.

sets.name: McDonald's Locket
sets.notes: McDonald's Happy Meal promotional locket. Most collectible of the 1994 McDonald's PP range. Chain frequently missing.

sets.name: Birthday Party Travel Game
sets.notes: Birthday party themed travel game. Game components (cards, spinner, pieces) almost always missing. Complete examples very rare.

sets.name: Pet Store Travel Game
sets.notes: Pet store themed travel game. Game components almost always missing. Complete examples very rare.

sets.name: Party Game
sets.notes: Party-themed compact game. Third travel/party game in the 1994 lineup.

sets.name: Light-Up Horse House
sets.notes: Also known as Horseshoe Saloon. Light-up barn/stable compact. Horse figure frequently missing. One of two light-up animal houses in 1994.

sets.name: Light-Up Kitty House
sets.notes: Also known as Cat Mews House. Light-up kitty/cat house compact. Companion to Light-Up Horse House.

sets.name: Polly's Show Time Locket
sets.notes: Theatre/showtime theme wearable locket. Chain frequently missing.

sets.name: Polly's Tea Time Locket
sets.notes: Tea party theme wearable locket. Tiny tea set accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Polly's Secret Diary
commonlyMissing: Lock mechanism broken in many examples
sets.notes: Shaped like a tiny lockable diary. Key is almost always missing. Lock mechanism frequently non-functional in older examples. Complete with working key is a premium.

sets.name: Glitter Dreams
commonlyMissing: Glitter worn off on many examples
sets.notes: Glitter/sparkle themed. Part of the 1995 Glitter series. Glitter finish worn or rubbed on many examples — pristine glitter indicates good condition.

sets.name: Glitter Wedding
sets.notes: Part of the 1995 Glitter series. Wedding theme with glitter decoration. Groom figure frequently missing.

sets.name: Glitter Island
sets.notes: Also known as Tropical Paradise. Part of the 1995 Glitter series. Tropical island theme.

sets.name: Lulu's Glitter Heart Earrings
sets.notes: Wearable glitter heart-shaped earrings. No doll — purely accessory. Part of 1995 Glitter series. Glitter finish wears with time.

sets.name: Princess Palace
sets.notes: Also known as Sparkling Palace. 1995 version — distinct from the 1993 Princess Palace locket. Large palace playset with sparkle decoration.

sets.name: Sparkle Snowland
sets.notes: Also known as Winter Wonderland. Sparkle series winter set. Snowman is a separate accessory — frequently missing.

sets.name: Sparkling Mermaid Adventure
sets.notes: Also known as Mermaid Kingdom. Mermaid/underwater sparkle theme. Part of the 1995 Sparkle series. Small sea creature figures frequently missing.

sets.name: Swinging Pretty
sets.notes: Playground swing set theme. Active/outdoor play.

sets.name: Clubhouse
sets.notes: Clubhouse with multiple rooms and figures. Multiple figures means completeness is harder to achieve.

sets.name: Comb N Curl Salon
sets.notes: Hair salon theme. Small styling accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Hatbox
sets.notes: Shaped like a hatbox — distinctive round format. Fashion/hat collection theme. Individual hat accessories small and frequently missing.

sets.name: Stylin' Salon
sets.notes: Larger salon format than Comb N Curl. Full service styling salon theme.

sets.name: Stylin' Workout
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Fitness Studio. Gym/fitness centre theme. Part of the Stylin' series.

sets.name: Super Star Hair
sets.notes: Also known as Film Star Polly. Hollywood glamour hair salon theme. Camera accessory frequently missing.

sets.name: Children's Hospital
sets.notes: Hospital/medical theme. One of the more unusual 1995 themes. Medical accessories are small and frequently missing.

sets.name: Dance Studio
sets.notes: Dance/ballet studio theme. Multiple student figures included — frequently missing.

sets.name: Ice Cream Fun
sets.notes: Ice cream parlour theme. Part of three ice cream sets in 1995. Small ice cream accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Ice Cream Stand
sets.notes: Outdoor ice cream cart stand. Cart umbrella is frequently damaged or missing. One of three 1995 ice cream sets.

sets.name: Ice Cream Parlor
sets.notes: Largest of the three 1995 ice cream sets. Full sit-down parlour interior with multiple accessories.

sets.name: Supermarket
sets.notes: Supermarket/grocery store theme. Shopping trolley and food accessories are frequently missing.

sets.name: McDonald's Chalet
sets.notes: McDonald's Happy Meal winter chalet promotional set. Partial sets commonly found. Part of the 1995 McDonald's promotion.

sets.name: Circus Wagon on the Go
sets.notes: Circus wagon caravan format. Horse figure is a key completeness marker — frequently missing. One of the 'on the go' vehicle series.

sets.name: Pony Jumpin' Fun
sets.notes: Show jumping/equestrian theme. Fence pieces are small and frequently missing. Rosette accessory almost always gone.

sets.name: Pony Sisters
sets.notes: Features two sister ponies. Multiple small figures means completeness is harder — pony figures frequently missing.

sets.name: Arabian Beauty
sets.notes: Arabian horse theme with ornate design. One of the more exotic pony sets. Horse figure frequently missing.

sets.name: Western Pony
sets.notes: Western/cowgirl theme. Part of the 1995 pony series. Lasso is a tiny accessory — almost always missing.

sets.name: Palomino Pony
sets.notes: Features a palomino-coloured horse. Part of the 1995 pony series. Horse figure frequently missing.

sets.name: Shetland Pony Stables
sets.notes: Largest of the 1995 pony sets. Features Shetland ponies in a full stable complex. Multiple small pony figures frequently missing.

sets.name: Unicorn Meadow
sets.notes: Fantasy unicorn theme — one of the most magical sets of 1995. Unicorn figure is the key piece and frequently missing. Highly desirable among collectors.

sets.name: Polly Loves Kitty
sets.notes: Part of the 1995 Polly Loves Pets series. Cat/kitten theme. Small cat accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Polly Loves Bear
sets.notes: Part of the 1995 Polly Loves Pets series. Bear theme. Companion to Polly Loves Kitty and Polly Loves Puppy.

sets.name: Polly Loves Puppy
sets.notes: Part of the 1995 Polly Loves Pets series. Dog/puppy theme. Lead is a tiny accessory — frequently missing.

sets.name: Rainbow Stamper Ring
sets.notes: Wearable ring with built-in stamp. Part of 1995 stamper series. Ink dried in nearly all examples. Ring base frequently missing.

sets.name: Sun Stamper Ring
sets.notes: Also known as Sunshine Stamper Ring. Sun-themed wearable stamp ring. Ink dried in nearly all examples.

sets.name: Starbright Pencil Stamper
sets.notes: Functional pencil with star shape and stamp on the end. Tiny Polly scene visible inside. Ink and pencil nib both worn in most examples.

sets.name: Moonlight Pencil Stamper
sets.notes: Moon-themed companion to Starbright Pencil Stamper. Functional pencil with stamp. Ink and nib worn in most examples.

sets.name: Polly's Pattern and Picture Maker
sets.notes: Art/craft activity set for creating patterns and pictures. Stencils are small and frequently separated. Rarely found complete.

sets.name: Polly's Starburst Ruler and Sharpener
sets.notes: Functional star-shaped ruler with built-in pencil sharpener. No doll — purely stationery accessory. Sharpener cap frequently lost.

sets.name: Shooting Star Eraser Case
sets.notes: Shooting star-shaped case containing erasers. No doll. Purely stationery item. Individual erasers almost always missing.

sets.name: Flip-It Watch
sets.notes: Flip-top watch — the cover flips open to reveal a Polly Pocket scene. Watch mechanism frequently non-working. Flip mechanism broken in many examples. Band cracks with age.

sets.name: Sweet Treat Shoppe
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Sweetie Land. Sweet/candy shop theme. Small candy accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Toy Fun Playhouse
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Toy Land. Toy shop/playroom theme.

sets.name: Rides and Surprises
sets.notes: Also known as Fun Fair. Fairground/amusement park with multiple rides. Ride car accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Silly Spinner
sets.notes: Also known as Caterpillar Ride. Spinning caterpillar fairground ride. Part of the 1996 fairground series.

sets.name: Duck Chase
sets.notes: Also known as Catch-a-Duck. Fairground duck-catching game theme. Duck figures are small and frequently missing.

sets.name: Spin Pretty Carousel
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Magical Carousel. Spinning carousel with horses. One of the larger 1996 fairground sets.

sets.name: Happy Flyers
sets.notes: Also known as Rocket Ride. Flying/rocket fairground ride. Rocket car accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Twirler
sets.notes: Twirling fairground ride. Part of the 1996 fairground series.

sets.name: Butterflyer
sets.notes: Butterfly-shaped flying fairground ride. Wing accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Bouncy Castle
sets.notes: Bouncy castle fairground theme. Multiple figures included — frequently missing.

sets.name: Bowling Alley
sets.notes: Described as 'Ultra Rare' by some collectors. Bowling alley with functioning lane. Pins and ball are tiny and almost always missing. One of the harder 1996 sets to find complete.

sets.name: Sparkle Ballerina
sets.notes: Ballet theme with sparkle decoration. 1996 Sparkle series. Sparkle finish can wear over time.

sets.name: Crown Palace
sets.notes: Large crown-shaped palace. One of the statement sets of 1996. Crown decoration pieces can detach and go missing.

sets.name: Carnival Queen
sets.notes: Carnival queen parade theme. Elaborate float design. Decoration accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Sweet Roses
sets.notes: Rose garden theme. Pram is a key accessory frequently missing.

sets.name: Classroom on the Go
sets.notes: Classroom inside a vehicle/bus format. Part of the On the Go series. Multiple figures means completeness harder to achieve.

sets.name: Flower Cafe on the Go
sets.notes: Flower-themed cafe inside a vehicle format. Part of the 1996 On the Go series.

sets.name: Pet Surgery on the Go
sets.notes: Veterinary surgery inside a vehicle format. Animal figures and tiny medical tools frequently missing.

sets.name: Baby Friends
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Babysitting Set. Nursery/babysitting theme. Multiple small baby figures frequently missing.

sets.name: Fashion Friends
sets.notes: Fashion boutique theme with multiple friend figures. Part of the Friends series.

sets.name: Crystal Bracelet
sets.notes: Wearable crystal-style bracelet — no doll. Part of 1996 jewellery range. Clasp frequently missing.

sets.name: Crystal Heart Pendant
sets.notes: Wearable crystal heart pendant — no doll. Chain frequently missing. Part of 1996 jewellery range.

sets.name: Lip Gloss in a Musical Compact
sets.shape: Musical compact with real lip gloss
sets.notes: Functional musical compact containing real lip gloss. Music plays when opened. Lip gloss dried out in virtually all examples. Music mechanism frequently non-working. One of the most unique 1996 items.

sets.name: Wedding Day
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Bridal Locket. Wedding day theme wearable locket. Variation exists. Groom figure frequently missing.

sets.name: Moonride Pencil Case
sets.notes: Moon-shaped pencil case with tiny PP scene. Functional stationery item. Contents frequently missing.

sets.name: Pop-Up Playsets
sets.notes: Pop-up expanding format playset. Pop-up mechanism frequently damaged or stuck in older examples.

sets.name: Dolphin Island
sets.notes: Dolphin/ocean island theme. Dolphin figures are small and frequently missing.

sets.name: Holiday Fun
sets.notes: Also known as Hawaiian Fun. Hawaiian holiday theme. Surfboard accessory frequently missing.

sets.name: Jungle Adventure
sets.notes: Jungle/safari adventure theme. Animal figures and explorer accessories small and frequently missing.

sets.name: Snow Mountain
sets.notes: Snow mountain/ski resort theme. Ski equipment accessories small and frequently missing.

sets.name: Summer Villa
sets.notes: Mediterranean summer villa theme. Pool accessories frequently missing.

sets.name: Italian Holiday
sets.notes: Italian holiday/Venice theme. Gondola is the standout accessory — frequently missing.

sets.name: Polly in Paris
sets.notes: Also known as Polly's Paris Shopping Adventure. Parisian theme with Eiffel Tower element. One of the most charming 1996 travel sets. Eiffel Tower piece frequently missing.

sets.name: Surf N Swim Island
sets.notes: Tropical surf and swim island theme. Surfboard accessories frequently missing.
